text: Standing in the first space, I feel anticipation—an emptiness waiting to be filled, perhaps with ideas or conversations not yet spoken. The geometry and lighting are clean, almost clinical, yet they promise potential for gathering and reflection. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and explorations of research and development, I feel inspired and curious. Here, innovation announces itself boldly on the walls, urging me to consider the interplay of human and machine, the evolving shape of our collective story. I am both observer and participant in this unfolding tapestry of intellect and creativity.
